name: chr11p11_pericentric_alpha_HSat
description: Chromosome 11 p-arm pericentric flank (11p11.1-11p11.2), the immediate sub-centromeric LCR shoreline on the p-side of the chr11 centromere. Alpha-satellite (D11Z1), pericentromeric SDs and HSat patches. Resolved in T2T-CHM13.

architecture.internal_structure: alpha-sat HOR + HSat patches + pericentromeric SD shoreline.
